headline: SpaceX and other mega IPOs may wait years to join the S&P 500
summary: SpaceX and other mega IPO candidates may have to wait years before joining the S&P 500 after S&P Dow Jones Indices retained its profitability requirement for index inclusion. Despite their massive valuations, companies such as SpaceX, OpenAI and Anthropic must demonstrate sustained profits before becoming eligible for the benchmark.
